# Knowledge Point 1

## Core Concepts

Network effects describe how a platform becomes more valuable as more users join.

## Case Study

Uber's two-sided marketplace demonstrates strong cross-side network effects.

## Original Text

> Platform strategy is fundamentally about orchestrating network effects.

> — Source: Platform Strategy.pdf, Author: Parker & Van Alstyne, pp.45-52

## Reflection Questions

1. How do same-side and cross-side network effects differ?
2. What makes network effects a defensible moat?
